executives.name: Lisa Su
executives.background: Dr. Su is AMD’s Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer. She has been AMD’s President and Chief Executive Officer since October 2014 and Chair of the Board since May 2022. Previously, she served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Global Business Units from 2012 to 2014. Prior to joining AMD, Dr. Su served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Networking and Multimedia at Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and spent 13 years at IBM in various engineering and business leadership positions.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Jean Hu
executives.background: Ms. Hu is AMD’s Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer. She joined AMD in January 2023. Previously, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Marvell Technology, Inc. from 2016 to 2023. She also held senior financial leadership roles at Qlogic and Conexant Systems.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer

executives.name: Mark Papermaster
executives.background: Mr. Papermaster is AMD’s Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. He joined AMD in 2011. Previously, he was Vice President of the Silicon Engineering Group at Cisco Systems, Inc. and Senior Vice President of Devices Hardware Engineering at Apple Inc. He also spent 26 years at IBM.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Forrest Norrod
executives.background: Mr. Norrod is AMD’s Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group. He joined AMD in 2014. Previously, he was Vice President and General Manager of Dell’s server business.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group

executives.name: Harry Wolin
executives.background: Mr. Wolin is AMD’s Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. He has been with AMD since 2000 and was appointed General Counsel in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Lisa Su
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and CEO of AMD. Joined the board in 2014.

board_of_directors.name: John Caldwell
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of SMTC Corporation. Director since 2006. Lead Independent Director.

board_of_directors.name: Nora Denzel
board_of_directors.background: Former Interim CEO of Outerwall Inc. and former executive at Intuit and HP. Director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Durcan
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Micron Technology, Inc. Director since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Gregoire
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of CA Technologies and Taleo Corporation. Director since 2019.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Householder
board_of_directors.background: Former President and COO of Sempra Energy. Director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Jon Olson
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of Xilinx, Inc. Joined AMD board following the Xilinx acquisition in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Abhi Talwalkar
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of LSI Corporation. Director since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Elizabeth Vanderslice
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Wired Digital, Inc. Joined AMD board following the Xilinx acquisition in 2022.
